CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2005 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2005 Continued To Jun-24-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Mia Balckler, Esq. for Plaintiff: Pacific Service Credit Union.
Order waiving live testimony is in file
Exhibit 1---CC&R---------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Accounting---------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Vincent E. Agbulos as follows:
Principal $30,997.04
Prejudgment Interest $1,107.20
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $459.42 for a total of $35,388.66
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel to stipulated for the return of the exhibits in open court.
